ul.li: Memory Model: Sequential Consistency (Atomic) for deopt_count.
Memory Alignment: 8-byte alignment enforced (0x410/0x418) to prevent split-cache-line access.
Cache Locality: Hot counter at offset 0x04 is near the start of the cache line to optimize fetch.
Thresholding: Logic prevents redundant JIT invalidation via already_set state path.
